title: Alex's Mobs Compat
description: Adds compat between Alexs Mobs and many mods!
body:
**Description:**

This datapack* adds compatability between many mods and Alex's Mobs in a variety of ways! Additonally this datapack* works on all versions and loaders of modded minecraft (that have Alex's Mobs of course).

**Important Notice:**

*Keep in mind this is a datpack and not a resourcepack and can be more complicated to install and play with it is suggested to use a mod such as [Paxi](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paxi) to make it simple.

**Supported Mods:**

- Farmer's Delight
- Haunted Harvest
- Sully's Mod
- Deep Aether
- Crabber's Delight
- Buzzier Bees
- Gardens of the Dead
- L_ender's Cataclysm
